EP260514a 214.297, 49.365 3 / 60 2026-05-14T16:56:06 UT 500 ? Y N N N N N 0.0 N OFT found 3 detections with the best one of SNR=4.8, STD=1.0 at 2026-05-14T16:51:38.06 with 10.24 s scale and 8-50 keV, at RA, Dec=214.489, 49.926, which is coincident with EP260514a. However, given its position near the edge of the FoV, and the rising background, it's difficult to say if this is real. link
